warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills: 5-8min
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Band Row Rotate Press
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Hang Power Clean
3 Tall Clean
10 Strict Press

strength.name: Clean Pull
strength.description:
1x3 | * Throw the hips UP into the bar
* Get Tall
* Big Shrug + let elbows float | 1x3
E2MOM 12min
Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Keep them clean.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3
06:00 3
08:00 3
10:00 3

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
5 RFT 15min cap
10 Burpee Box Step Over
10 Push Ups
8 Power Cleans @ 50/35kg

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address pulling strength and arm hypertrophy while sparing lower body and pressing muscles already taxed by cleans and burpees.

siri_text: Wednesday's workout. Strength: Clean Pull, 1 by 3. Strength: Clean, 4 by 3 at 70 percent. Metcon: Rounds for Time: 10 Burpee Box Step Over, 10 Push Ups, 8 Power Cleans @ 50/35kg. For hypertrophy, focus on back (rows), biceps, rear delts.
